videos.title: Web Workers Crash Course - JavaScript Background Threads
videos.description: A comprehensive crash course on Web Workers covering dedicated workers, message passing, error handling, and building a practical example application.

videos.title: JavaScript Web Workers - The Complete Guide
videos.description: Learn everything about Web Workers including how they work, when to use them, and practical examples with performance comparisons.

videos.title: Web Workers and Service Workers Explained
videos.description: An in-depth tutorial explaining the differences between Web Workers, Service Workers, and Worklets with real-world use cases.

videos.title: JavaScript Web Workers Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to use Web Workers to run JavaScript in the background, improve performance, and build responsive web applications.

videos.title: Using Web Workers for CPU Intensive Tasks
videos.description: Practical demonstration of using Web Workers for CPU-intensive tasks like image processing and data analysis without blocking the UI.
